notes: Whoop uses OAuth 2.0 authorization-code flow — no static API key. A fresh access token is short-lived (1 hour) and is obtained interactively via 'whoop-pp-cli auth login --client-id --client-secret', which requires a registered redirect URI on the user's Whoop OAuth app and a browser approval step. The token used during this run expired at 2026-05-09T10:27:41-04:00 before publish-time live dogfood could be re-run. The CLI was manually exercised end-to-end during the run: auth login (browser flow), profile/recovery/cycle/workout/sleep GETs (live), sync (live, after fixing limit<=25 cap), and the 9 novel local-only commands against an empty store (graceful 'No data' messages). All structural checks (go build, go vet, govulncheck, --help, --version, manifest, verify-skill) pass.
